requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN + CR Mark (TCVN CISPR 15)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN + CR 标志（TCVN CISPR 15）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN + CR 標誌（TCVN CISPR 15）

summary.en: Vietnam regulates electromagnetic compatibility of lighting equipment through QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN, the national technical regulation on electromagnetic compatibility for electrical and electronic lighting equipment and similar equipment, issued by the Ministry of Science and Technology (MOST/BKHCN). QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN is mandatory: lighting products in scope must undergo certification or declaration of conformity through a designated certification body and bear the CR conformity mark (dau hop quy) before customs clearance and market placement. The technical limits are based on TCVN CISPR 15 (radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), covering conducted emissions on the mains terminals and radiated emissions. Conformity assessment is performed against the QCVN regulation; testing is by a designated/recognised conformity-assessment body. Luminaires with integrated radio functionality additionally fall under MIC type-approval rules (see ledvn-safety / MIC requirements).
summary.zh: 越南通过 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN 对照明设备的电磁兼容性进行管理，该法规为科学技术部（MOST/BKHCN）发布的电气电子照明及类似设备电磁兼容国家技术法规。QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN 为强制性：范围内照明产品在清关及上市前，须经指定认证机构进行认证或合格声明，并加施 CR 合格标志（dau hop quy）。技术限值以 TCVN CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性）为基础，涵盖电源端传导发射及辐射发射。合格评定依据 QCVN 法规进行，检测由指定/认可的合格评定机构完成。集成无线电功能的灯具还须符合 MIC 型号核准规则（见 ledvn-safety / MIC 要求）。
summary.zht: 越南通過 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN 對照明設備的電磁兼容性進行管理，該法規為科學技術部（MOST/BKHCN）發布的電氣電子照明及類似設備電磁兼容國家技術法規。QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN 為強制性：範圍內照明產品在清關及上市前，須經指定認證機構進行認證或合格聲明，並加施 CR 合格標誌（dau hop quy）。技術限值以 TCVN CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性）為基礎，涵蓋電源端傳導發射及輻射發射。合格評定依據 QCVN 法規進行，檢測由指定/認可的合格評定機構完成。集成無線電功能的燈具還須符合 MIC 型號核准規則（見 ledvn-safety / MIC 要求）。

standards_or_laws: QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN — National technical regulation on electromagnetic compatibility of electrical and electronic lighting equipment and similar equipment (Ministry of Science and Technology, mandatory; enforced with the CR conformity mark)
TCVN CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (emissions technical basis)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), which is technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (which covers both safety and EMC for relevant product categories). Testing must be conducted at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories in China. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not automatically accepted under the Vietnamese QCVN 19 conformity-assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关产品类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分。检测须在中国 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告不自动被越南 QCVN 19 合格评定路径所接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關產品類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分。檢測須在中國 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告不自動被越南 QCVN 19 合格評定路徑所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN (TCVN CISPR 15 basis) and China GB 17743 (CISPR 15 basis) share largely harmonised emission limits, so the underlying engineering is comparable. The substantive gaps are procedural: (1) Vietnam requires conformity assessment against the QCVN regulation through a designated certification body and the CR mark on the product before customs clearance — a Chinese CCC certificate and GB 17743 report do not substitute and are not automatically accepted; (2) the importer of record in Vietnam is responsible for the conformity declaration/certification filing; (3) testing should be by a Vietnam-designated or recognised conformity-assessment body, or a report acceptable under the QCVN scheme — confirm the specific body's acceptance; (4) the CR mark format, registration, and supporting dossier are Vietnam-specific. Manufacturers should plan for a separate QCVN 19 conformity-assessment exercise even where the product already holds Chinese CCC.
gap.zh: QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN（TCVN CISPR 15 基础）与中国 GB 17743（CISPR 15 基础）的发射限值基本协调，底层工程相当。实质差距为程序性：（1）越南要求在清关前经指定认证机构依 QCVN 法规进行合格评定并在产品上加施 CR 标志——中国 CCC 证书及 GB 17743 报告不可替代且不自动被接受；（2）越南的进口登记人负责合格声明/认证备案；（3）检测应由越南指定或认可的合格评定机构进行，或出具 QCVN 方案下可接受的报告——请确认具体机构的接受情况；（4）CR 标志格式、注册及支持卷宗均为越南特有。即使产品已持有中国 CCC，制造商也应安排单独的 QCVN 19 合格评定。
gap.zht: QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN（TCVN CISPR 15 基礎）與中國 GB 17743（CISPR 15 基礎）的發射限值基本協調，底層工程相當。實質差距為程序性：（1）越南要求在清關前經指定認證機構依 QCVN 法規進行合格評定並在產品上加施 CR 標誌——中國 CCC 證書及 GB 17743 報告不可替代且不自動被接受；（2）越南的進口登記人負責合格聲明/認證備案；（3）檢測應由越南指定或認可的合格評定機構進行，或出具 QCVN 方案下可接受的報告——請確認具體機構的接受情況；（4）CR 標誌格式、注冊及支持卷宗均為越南特有。即使產品已持有中國 CCC，製造商也應安排單獨的 QCVN 19 合格評定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN EMC conformity certification/declaration and the CR conformity mark are required before customs clearance and market placement in Vietnam
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: Ministry of Science and Technology (MOST/BKHCN), Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC emissions of LED lighting in Vietnam are mandatorily regulated by QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN, enforced through designated-body conformity assessment and the CR mark before customs clearance. Limits derive from TCVN CISPR 15 and are broadly harmonised with China GB 17743 (also CISPR 15-based), but a Chinese CCC certificate and GB 17743 report are not automatically accepted. A separate QCVN 19 conformity exercise, an in-country importer of record, and the CR mark are required. Smart luminaires with radio functions additionally fall under MIC type approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 越南 LED 照明的 EMC 发射由 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN 强制管理，须在清关前经指定机构合格评定并加施 CR 标志。限值源自 TCVN CISPR 15，与中国 GB 17743（同基于 CISPR 15）基本协调，但中国 CCC 证书及 GB 17743 报告不自动被接受。须进行单独的 QCVN 19 合格评定、设立境内进口登记人并加施 CR 标志。集成无线电功能的智能灯具还须取得 MIC 型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 越南 LED 照明的 EMC 發射由 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN 強制管理，須在清關前經指定機構合格評定並加施 CR 標誌。限值源自 TCVN CISPR 15，與中國 GB 17743（同基於 CISPR 15）基本協調，但中國 CCC 證書及 GB 17743 報告不自動被接受。須進行單獨的 QCVN 19 合格評定、設立境內進口登記人並加施 CR 標誌。集成無線電功能的智能燈具還須取得 MIC 型號核准。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — TCVN IEC 61547 (Lighting Equipment Immunity Requirements)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 抗扰度——TCVN IEC 61547（照明设备抗扰度要求）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 抗擾度——TCVN IEC 61547（照明設備抗擾度要求）

summary.en: Beyond emissions, lighting equipment in Vietnam is expected to demonstrate adequate electromagnetic immunity in its intended environment. The technical basis is TCVN IEC 61547 (Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements), the Vietnamese adoption of IEC 61547. Immunity testing covers electrostatic discharge (IEC 61000-4-2), electrical fast transient/burst (IEC 61000-4-4), surge (IEC 61000-4-5), conducted RF disturbances (IEC 61000-4-6), power-frequency magnetic field (IEC 61000-4-8), and voltage dips/interruptions (IEC 61000-4-11). Whether immunity testing is a mandatory part of the QCVN 19 conformity scope or a supporting technical standard depends on the current QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN scope and the designated body's assessment package — confirm the applicable requirement for the specific product. Vietnam's grid is 220 V single-phase, 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 除发射外，越南照明设备须在其预期环境中证明具备足够的电磁抗扰度。技术基础为 TCVN IEC 61547（一般照明设备——EMC 抗扰度要求），即越南采用的 IEC 61547。抗扰度试验涵盖静电放电（IEC 61000-4-2）、电快速瞬变/脉冲群（IEC 61000-4-4）、浪涌（IEC 61000-4-5）、传导射频骚扰（IEC 61000-4-6）、工频磁场（IEC 61000-4-8）及电压暂降/中断（IEC 61000-4-11）。抗扰度试验属于 QCVN 19 合格范围的强制部分还是支持性技术标准，取决于现行 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN 范围及指定机构的评定方案——请就具体产品确认适用要求。越南电网为 220 V 单相、50 Hz。
summary.zht: 除發射外，越南照明設備須在其預期環境中證明具備足夠的電磁抗擾度。技術基礎為 TCVN IEC 61547（一般照明設備——EMC 抗擾度要求），即越南採用的 IEC 61547。抗擾度試驗涵蓋靜電放電（IEC 61000-4-2）、電快速瞬變/脈衝群（IEC 61000-4-4）、浪湧（IEC 61000-4-5）、傳導射頻騷擾（IEC 61000-4-6）、工頻磁場（IEC 61000-4-8）及電壓暫降/中斷（IEC 61000-4-11）。抗擾度試驗屬於 QCVN 19 合格範圍的強制部分還是支持性技術標準，取決於現行 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN 範圍及指定機構的評定方案——請就具體產品確認適用要求。越南電網為 220 V 單相、50 Hz。

standards_or_laws: TCVN IEC 61547 — Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements (Vietnamese adoption of IEC 61547)
QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN — National technical regulation on EMC of electrical and electronic lighting equipment (scope of mandatory immunity assessment to be confirmed for the specific product)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 18595-2014 (General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment), technically equivalent to IEC 61547:2009. GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is less strictly enforced than the CN emissions standard GB 17743. CCC certification for CN luminaires generally focuses more on safety and emissions than immunity. Because both the Vietnamese TCVN IEC 61547 and Chinese GB/T 18595 derive from IEC 61547, the underlying immunity test methods and pass levels are largely common.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 18595-2014（照明设备的电磁抗扰度要求），技术上等同于 IEC 61547:2009。GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），执行力度弱于中国发射标准 GB 17743。针对中国灯具的 CCC 认证通常更侧重安全和发射而非抗扰度。由于越南 TCVN IEC 61547 与中国 GB/T 18595 均源自 IEC 61547，底层抗扰度试验方法及合格等级基本共通。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 18595-2014（照明設備的電磁抗擾度要求），技術上等同於 IEC 61547:2009。GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），執行力度弱於中國發射標準 GB 17743。針對中國燈具的 CCC 認證通常更側重安全和發射而非抗擾度。由於越南 TCVN IEC 61547 與中國 GB/T 18595 均源自 IEC 61547，底層抗擾度試驗方法及合格等級基本共通。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18595-2014 — General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, aligned with IEC 61547:2009)

gap.en: TCVN IEC 61547 and GB/T 18595 are both IEC 61547-derived, so a product already tested to GB/T 18595 has a comparable technical base and may face reduced re-testing of immunity. The practical gaps are: (1) documentation — the Vietnamese conformity dossier should contain immunity evidence acceptable to the designated certification body, whereas a Chinese CCC file may not include an equivalent immunity test report since GB/T 18595 is recommended and not universally enforced; (2) confirm whether immunity is a mandatory line item within the applicable QCVN 19 conformity scope for the product, versus a supporting standard; (3) test reports should be from a laboratory accepted under the Vietnamese scheme. The grid context is similar (Vietnam 220 V single-phase 50 Hz; China 50 Hz, 220 V single-phase nominal with 380 V three-phase), so immunity test conditions transfer well, but the Vietnamese dossier and CR-mark conformity remain a separate exercise from Chinese CCC.
gap.zh: TCVN IEC 61547 与 GB/T 18595 均源自 IEC 61547，因此已按 GB/T 18595 测试的产品技术基础相当，抗扰度重测负担可能减少。实务差距为：（1）文件——越南合格卷宗应包含指定认证机构可接受的抗扰度证据，而中国 CCC 文件可能不含等效抗扰度试验报告，因 GB/T 18595 为推荐性且未普遍执行；（2）须确认抗扰度对该产品是否为适用 QCVN 19 合格范围内的强制项目，还是作为支持性标准；（3）检测报告应来自越南方案下可接受的实验室。电网情况相近（越南 220 V 单相 50 Hz；中国 50 Hz，220 V 单相标称并有 380 V 三相），抗扰度试验条件易于迁移，但越南卷宗及 CR 标志合格仍是独立于中国 CCC 的工作。
gap.zht: TCVN IEC 61547 與 GB/T 18595 均源自 IEC 61547，因此已按 GB/T 18595 測試的產品技術基礎相當，抗擾度重測負擔可能減少。實務差距為：（1）文件——越南合格卷宗應包含指定認證機構可接受的抗擾度證據，而中國 CCC 文件可能不含等效抗擾度試驗報告，因 GB/T 18595 為推薦性且未普遍執行；（2）須確認抗擾度對該產品是否為適用 QCVN 19 合格範圍內的強制項目，還是作為支持性標準；（3）檢測報告應來自越南方案下可接受的實驗室。電網情況相近（越南 220 V 單相 50 Hz；中國 50 Hz，220 V 單相標稱並有 380 V 三相），抗擾度試驗條件易於遷移，但越南卷宗及 CR 標誌合格仍是獨立於中國 CCC 的工作。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — EMC immunity per TCVN IEC 61547 supports demonstration of EMC conformity; whether it is a mandatory line item within QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN for the specific product must be confirmed with the designated certification body
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended — GB/T 18595-2014 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard; immunity testing is not universally enforced for all luminaire categories under CCC

source.publisher: Ministry of Science and Technology (MOST/BKHCN), Vietnam

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC immunity for LED lighting in Vietnam rests on TCVN IEC 61547 (IEC 61547 adoption). Whether immunity is a mandatory part of the QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN conformity scope or a supporting technical standard should be confirmed with the designated certification body for the specific product. The technical base is largely common with China's recommended GB/T 18595, so re-testing may be reduced, but the Vietnamese conformity dossier and CR-mark process are separate from Chinese CCC, and immunity evidence acceptable to the Vietnamese designated body should be included.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 越南 LED 照明的 EMC 抗扰度以 TCVN IEC 61547（采用 IEC 61547）为基础。抗扰度对具体产品是否为 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN 合格范围的强制部分，还是作为支持性技术标准，应与指定认证机构确认。技术基础与中国推荐性 GB/T 18595 基本共通，重测可能减少，但越南合格卷宗及 CR 标志流程独立于中国 CCC，应纳入越南指定机构可接受的抗扰度证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 越南 LED 照明的 EMC 抗擾度以 TCVN IEC 61547（採用 IEC 61547）為基礎。抗擾度對具體產品是否為 QCVN 19:2019/BKHCN 合格範圍的強制部分，還是作為支持性技術標準，應與指定認證機構確認。技術基礎與中國推薦性 GB/T 18595 基本共通，重測可能減少，但越南合格卷宗及 CR 標誌流程獨立於中國 CCC，應納入越南指定機構可接受的抗擾度證據。
